data.title: Happy Belly’s Heal Wellness Secures New Calgary Franchise Site in Shawnessey Village
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Happy Belly Food Group ( (TSE:HBFG) ) is now available.

Happy Belly Food Group’s Heal Wellness brand has secured a franchisee and real estate location in Shawnessey Village, a high-traffic retail hub in South Calgary, with the new quick-service restaurant expected to open in the second quarter of 2026. The move strengthens Heal’s footprint in Western Canada and taps into rising consumer demand for functional, wellness-focused QSR concepts, adding to a network of 31 open locations and more than 177 in development, and contributing to Happy Belly’s broader pipeline of 666 contractually committed franchise sites across its emerging brands, underscoring the company’s disciplined, asset-light growth strategy and long-term value ambitions for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:HBFG) stock is a Hold with a C$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Happy Belly Food Group stock, see the TSE:HBFG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:HBFG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:HBFG is a Neutral.

Happy Belly Food Group’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by its financial performance, which shows strong revenue growth but significant profitability and cash flow challenges. Technical analysis indicates a bullish trend, but overbought signals suggest caution. The valuation is weak due to a negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:HBFG stock, click here.

More about Happy Belly Food Group

Happy Belly Food Group Inc. is a Toronto-based consolidator of emerging food and restaurant brands, focused on acquiring and scaling quick-service and fast-casual concepts across Canada and the United States. Its portfolio includes wellness-focused smoothie and bowl chain Heal Wellness, as well as brands such as Rosie’s Burgers, Yolks Breakfast and Via Cibo Italian Street Food, with a growing base of contractually committed franchise locations supporting an asset-light expansion model.

Average Trading Volume: 190,148

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$258.9M

data.title: UraniumX Taps Former Orano Canada CEO as Strategic Advisor Ahead of Key Athabasca Drilling
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Stearman Resources, Inc. ( (TSE:STMN) ).

UraniumX Discovery Corp. has appointed veteran uranium executive Vincent Martin, former CEO of Orano Canada, as a strategic advisor to support the advancement of its three Athabasca Basin uranium properties, including the flagship Murphy Lake project. Martin’s 37 years of global uranium experience, spanning exploration, development, production, remediation and Indigenous and community engagement in the Athabasca Basin, is expected to significantly strengthen UraniumX’s technical and strategic capabilities as it prepares for a key drilling campaign at Murphy Lake in Q2 2026, while the company also aligns consultant incentives through the issuance of restricted share units under its existing equity plan.

More about Stearman Resources, Inc.

UraniumX Discovery Corp. is a Canadian-based junior mineral exploration company focused exclusively on uranium discovery in Saskatchewan’s Athabasca Basin, one of the world’s premier high‑grade uranium districts. Its flagship Murphy Lake property, where it can earn up to 70% through an option with F4 Uranium, lies on the basin’s eastern margin near the Wollaston Domain and has shown promising anomalous radioactivity in prior drilling. The company also holds 100% interests in the Zoo Bay Uranium Project and the NeoCore Uranium Property, both positioned near established uranium infrastructure and structurally prospective corridors, and employs geophysics, drilling and academic research partnerships in its exploration programs.

Average Trading Volume: 122,091

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

For an in-depth examination of STMN stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Otovo AS Class A ( (DE:89K) ) has provided an update.

Otovo reported that TORJUSSEN CONSULTING AS, a company closely associated with chairman of the board and primary insider Lars Erik Torjussen, purchased 467,500 Otovo shares on the open market at an average price of NOK 1.3055 per share, giving Torjussen direct and indirect control over the same number of shares. The transaction, disclosed in accordance with Norwegian securities regulations, signals increased insider ownership and may be interpreted by investors as a sign of confidence in Otovo’s strategy and prospects in the energy services market.

More about Otovo AS Class A

Otovo is an AI-native home and business energy services company operating in Europe and the United States, offering integrated solutions that combine real-time equipment monitoring, rapid repairs, dependable power supply and participation in electricity grids. Its Endurance AI platform continuously oversees installed energy equipment, optimizes the full service workflow from fault detection to resolution, and coordinates around-the-clock maintenance, and the company is listed on the Euronext Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker OTOVO.

data.title: Sana Biotechnology Highlights Diabetes Cell Therapy Advances at Conference
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sana Biotechnology ( (SANA) ) has issued an update.

At the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 14, 2026, Sana Biotechnology presented updated data showing that UP421, its hypoimmune-engineered primary pancreatic islet cell therapy, survived and functioned for at least 12 months in a type 1 diabetes patient without immunosuppression, meeting all primary and secondary endpoints with no therapy-related adverse events and demonstrating sustained immune evasion and insulin production. Building on these results, the company reported substantial 2025 progress toward SC451, its HIP-modified, stem cell-derived islet therapy for the broader type 1 diabetes population, with goals to file an IND and start a Phase 1 trial in 2026, while also advancing SG293, an in vivo CD19-directed CAR T cell program supported by non-human primate data and targeting first-in-human results in 2026, underscoring Sana’s push to translate its hypoimmune and fusosome platforms into scalable, potentially transformative treatments for diabetes and hematologic indications.

The most recent analyst rating on (SANA) stock is a Hold with a $4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sana Biotechnology stock, see the SANA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SANA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SANA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (no revenue, sizable losses, and ongoing cash burn) and increased balance-sheet risk from higher leverage and declining equity. Technicals are mixed (near-term weakness but longer-term support), while valuation is constrained by a negative P/E and lack of dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SANA stock, click here.

More about Sana Biotechnology

Sana Biotechnology is a cell and gene therapy company developing engineered cellular medicines, with a particular focus on hypoimmune (HIP) cell technologies and in vivo CAR T cell platforms. Its lead efforts target large unmet needs such as type 1 diabetes through pancreatic islet cell therapies and blood cancers and autoimmune diseases through CD19-directed CAR T cell therapies, aiming for off-the-shelf products that avoid chronic immunosuppression and conditioning chemotherapy.

Average Trading Volume: 5,134,024

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.22B

See more insights into SANA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bank of Montreal Prepares €1.5 Billion Covered Bond Issue With Potential Stabilisation
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bank Of Montreal ( (TSE:BMO) ) has provided an update.

Bank of Montreal’s London branch has announced a pre-stabilisation notice for a €1.5 billion covered bond issuance maturing in January 2031, priced at 99.945% of nominal value, with no guarantor. The bank’s London branch, acting as stabilising manager, may conduct price-supporting transactions and over-allotment during a stabilisation period starting 14 January 2026 and lasting up to 30 days after issuance, in line with UK and EU regulatory standards; the offer is targeted exclusively at professional and qualified investors in the UK and EEA and explicitly excludes any public offer or sales into the United States.

More about Bank Of Montreal

Bank of Montreal is a major North American banking institution that provides a broad range of financial services, including retail and commercial banking, wealth management and capital markets activities. Through its London branch, the bank is active in international funding and debt capital markets, issuing instruments such as covered bonds to institutional investors in Europe and the UK.

Find detailed analytics on BMO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

Federal Signal ( (FSS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 14, 2026, Federal Signal Corporation posted an investor presentation to its website outlining its financial profile, business mix and recent strategic investments, including capacity expansions and acquisitions such as Hog Technologies and New Way, which will bolster its specialty vehicle platform but did not contribute to 2024 sales. The materials highlight that the company generated approximately $2.06 billion in last-twelve-month net sales through the third quarter of 2025, has delivered a roughly 13% net sales CAGR from 2016 to 2024 with average five-year cash conversion of 106%, maintains low leverage at 0.4x net debt to EBITDA, and holds top-tier market share positions across key vehicle and safety product categories, underscoring resilient, largely publicly funded end-market exposure and a disciplined capital deployment strategy focused on M&A, capex, dividends and share repurchases.

The most recent analyst rating on (FSS) stock is a Buy with a $123.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Federal Signal stock, see the FSS Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FSS is a Outperform.

Federal Signal’s overall stock score is driven by its strong financial performance and positive earnings call sentiment, highlighting robust growth and strategic acquisitions. However, the technical analysis indicates potential bearish momentum, and the valuation suggests the stock may be overvalued. The company’s strategic acquisitions are expected to support long-term growth, but investors should monitor cash flow trends and market conditions.

To see Spark’s full report on FSS stock, click here.

More about Federal Signal

Federal Signal Corporation, founded in 1901 and headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois, is a leading original equipment manufacturer of safety equipment and specialty vehicles, operating through its Environmental Solutions Group (ESG) and Safety and Security Systems Group (SSG). ESG, which accounted for 84% of 2024 net sales, offers vacuum trucks, street sweepers, industrial cleaning equipment, dump truck bodies and trailers, refuse collection vehicles, multipurpose maintenance vehicles, road-marking and line-removal equipment, metal extraction support equipment and aftermarket services, serving primarily government and industrial end markets. SSG, contributing 16% of 2024 net sales, produces public safety equipment, industrial signaling products and warning systems, and benefits from stringent safety regulations and growing demand for audible and visual safety devices across government and industrial customers.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Stellantis Sets 2026 Financial Results Schedule and AGM Date
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Stellantis ( (IT:STLAM) ) has issued an update.

On January 13, 2026, Stellantis N.V. announced its 2026 corporate calendar, detailing the scheduled release dates for its financial results and key shareholder meeting. The company plans to publish its full-year 2025 financial results on February 26, 2026, followed by first-, second- and third-quarter 2026 results on April 30, July 30 and October 28, 2026, respectively, each accompanied by a webcast and conference call for investors. Stellantis also set April 14, 2026 as the date for its Annual General Meeting to approve the 2025 financial statements, and indicated that, if a dividend for the 2025 financial year is approved, the ex-date would fall in April 2026, in line with regulatory requirements. The clear timetable underlines the group’s continued practice of providing quarterly financial information and offers investors and other stakeholders greater visibility on forthcoming disclosures and governance milestones in 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:STLAM) stock is a Hold with a EUR8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Stellantis stock, see the IT:STLAM Stock Forecast page.

More about Stellantis

Stellantis N.V. is a leading global automaker with a broad portfolio of iconic and innovative brands including Abarth, Alfa Romeo, Chrysler, Citroën, Dodge, DS Automobiles, FIAT, Jeep, Lancia, Maserati, Opel, Peugeot, Ram, Vauxhall, Free2move and Leasys. The company focuses on providing customers with multiple mobility options, integrating the latest automotive and mobility technologies and targeting value creation for a wide base of stakeholders across key global markets.

Average Trading Volume: 23,950,364

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €33.68B

data.title: Partners Group Defies Private Markets Slowdown With 21% AuM Growth and Strong 2025 Exits
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Partners Group Holding AG ( (CH:PGHN) ) has issued an announcement.

Partners Group reported robust 2025 results, growing assets under management by 21% to USD 185 billion on the back of USD 30.2 billion in gross new assets, including a USD 4 billion contribution from the acquisition of Empira Group. The firm attracted USD 26.2 billion in new client demand, with bespoke mandates and evergreen products accounting for the bulk of fundraising, and deepened its distribution reach through a string of joint ventures with major financial institutions including Deutsche Bank, PGIM, Generali Investments, and others. Investment activity rose to USD 27 billion, focused on resilient opportunities such as Indian non-bank lender Infinity Fincorp Solutions, US mobile power provider Life Cycle Power, and high-profile royalties including a vehicle backing The Weeknd’s catalogue, while realizations surged 47% to USD 26 billion, underpinned by strong exits like the sale of PCI Pharma Services at a premium to recent valuations. By defying broader private markets headwinds in fundraising and deal flow, Partners Group has reinforced its competitive position and signaled confidence in continued growth, guiding to USD 26–32 billion in gross new client demand for 2026 despite ongoing market uncertainty.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:PGHN) stock is a Buy with a CHF1310.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Partners Group Holding AG stock, see the CH:PGHN Stock Forecast page.

More about Partners Group Holding AG

Partners Group Holding AG is a Switzerland-based global private markets investment manager, overseeing diversified portfolios in private equity, private credit, infrastructure, real estate and royalties. The firm structures its offerings through traditional closed-ended programs, bespoke institutional mandates and evergreen funds, targeting institutional and increasingly retail-like clients worldwide seeking tailored access to private markets strategies.

Average Trading Volume: 70,365

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: CHF26.9B

For an in-depth examination of PGHN stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.
